---
title: "PORTFOLIO MANAGEMENT"
author: "RAJAKRISHNAN MANIVEL"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
site: bookdown::bookdown_site
output: bookdown::gitbook
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE
)

library(bookdown)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(magrittr)   # Provides %>%
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(scales)
library(ggrepel)
```

# PG TDC
